hero.subtitle: From marine expertise to logistics, construction, tourism, and beyond — HASCO delivers world-class solutions that power the Kingdom's growth and global ambitions.

about.heading: About
about.description: HASCO has grown from a focused logistics provider into a diversified holding group. Based in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, we operate across Marine, Logistics, Construction, Shipping, Tourism, Hospitality, and Consultancy, supporting the nation's transformation under Vision 2030.

marine.title: Marine Operations
marine.description: Leading maritime services across the Red Sea, providing comprehensive marine consultancy, operations, and professional diving solutions.

logistics.title: Logistics & Supply Chain
logistics.description: Integrated logistics solutions with advanced freight forwarding, transportation management, and end-to-end supply chain optimization.

construction.title: Construction
construction.description: Delivering world-class construction projects with unwavering commitment to safety, quality excellence, and sustainable building practices.

hospitality.title: Hospitality & Events
hospitality.description: Premium hospitality services, exceptional catering experiences, and professional event management for memorable occasions.

tourism.title: Tourism
tourism.description: Pioneering tourism development and destination management services supporting the Kingdom's Vision 2030 tourism transformation.

consultancy.title: Consultancy
consultancy.description: Strategic consultancy services delivering expert insights and innovative solutions across diverse industries and sectors.

clients.heading: Trusted
clients.subtitle: Collaborating with the Kingdom's most ambitious projects and leading organizations
clients.statement: Powering the Kingdom's Vision 2030 through strategic partnerships
